notes: Build-90 was already committed AND pushed to origin/main (4ffb576) by a parallel builder session; I verified it end-to-end (mirror+static test 39/39, all 6 must-match and 2 must-not-match cases pass) rather than duplicating. Kickoff said lib/entities.js but the real file is lib/entity-graph.js (holds upsertEntity + the m8_entities table). RECOMMEND applying migrations/B90_entity_slug.sql before/with the next deploy: the committed entity-graph.js sends slug on writes without a retry-without-slug fallback, so new-entity inserts will error until the column exists (the slug resolution itself is wrapped in try/catch and entity extraction is fire-and-forget, so it is non-fatal).
